html:
NormalBurnt

“Standing near this device will provide the survivor with new things they can craft.

Crafting something new for the first time gives a boost of 15 Sanity.

Once an item is crafted, the survivor will know how to craft that item even away from the machine.”

-

The Alchemy Engine is the tier 2 Science station. It requires a Science Machine to prototype for all characters except Wickerbottom, and costs 4 Boards, 2 Cut Stones, and 2 Electrical Doodads to craft. Prototyping an Item using the Alchemy Engine will increase Sanity by 15.

See also: Crafting

Crafting Recipes

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Arcane Crystalarium skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from November 26, 2020 to December 15, 2020. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Woven - Elegant Alchemy Table skin was introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's Terraria. Its rarity was Inspired - Elegant initially, but received change in August 19, 2022.
  • The Proof of Purchase All-Chemical Engine skin is obtained by purchasing the Wilson Youtooz.
Elegant
Alchemy Pod
This pod uses space-age printing technology to perform unspace-age alchemy. How stylish!
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
An Eye for an Eye Collection
Alchemy Table
Everything a potion maker needs.
Woven - Elegant
Gothic Collection
Gothic Alchemical Kiln
A moody design for broody alchemists.
Loyal
Crystalline Collection
Arcane Crystalarium
Crystals have long been thought to hold transformative powers, perfect for alchemical experiments.
Proof of Purchase / Resurrected
All-Chemical Engine
Some might say that storing unstable chemicals next to a running engine is a "bad idea", but these people simply lack your vision.

Tips

  • An easy way to gather the crafting materials for an Alchemy Engine is to hammer down Pig Houses for Boards and Cut Stones, and to mine Gold Vein Boulders for Gold.
  • The Alchemy Engine is able to unlock Tier 1 items without the need for a nearby Science Machine, so it may be beneficial to break down the Science Machine for resources after building it.
  • Since Wickerbottom has Tier 2 items unlocked with the Science Machine, this machine is only necessary for crafting her book On Tentacles.

Trivia

  • In the early Beta version of Don't Starve, the game used a "Research Points" system, instead of prototyping. Crafting this station cost 200 Research Points.
  • As of the Hungry For Your Hunger update, Tier 3 recipes crafted using the Shadow Manipulator have been moved to the Alchemy Engine, due to the separation of Science and Magic.

"researchlab2"
NormalBurnt
“It's even more science-y than the last one!”
–Wilson
“Even I don't know everything... yet.”
–Willow
“I am not sure how I feel about... science.”
–Wolfgang
“I will learn unspeakable things.”
–Wendy
“HELLO, FRIEND”
–WX-78
“It's a research station. I can learn new things with it.”
–Wickerbottom
“This is getting strange.”
–Woodie
“It unlocks recipes of middling utility.”
–Maxwell
“Perhaps science can enhance my cömbat skills.”
–Wigfrid
“Father used to work on something like that.”
–Webber
“Oh, the things I'll learn!”
–Warly
“More things to make!”
–Wormwood
“I guess proximity activates the whirlygigs?”
–Winona
“Oh, how amusing!”
–Wortox
“All-kemmy... en...jun...”
–Wurt
“They never taught us about alchemy in school.”
–Walter
“It turns out that science is a lot easier than I thought!”
–Wanda
“The extra science didn't keep it alive.”
–Wilson
“There's no learning from that now.”
–Willow
“Science not so strong after all.”
–Wolfgang
“It is unspeakably burnt.”
–Wendy
“GOODBYE, FRIEND”
–WX-78
“I can't learn anything from a carbonized research station.”
–Wickerbottom
“Well, it obeys some basic laws of physics.”
–Woodie
“Flames have swallowed it whole.”
–Maxwell
“Dust tö dust.”
–Wigfrid
“All our work... gone.”
–Webber
“The fire seemed to find it quite tasty.”
–Warly
“Too bad”
–Wormwood
“Now we get to make another!”
–Winona
“Well, that was fun.”
–Wortox
“Well it gone now.”
–Wurt
“I wish things would stop catching fire.”
–Walter
“Oh drat.”
–Wanda

Main article: Belongings
The Loyal Arcane Crystalarium skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from November 26, 2020 to December 15, 2020. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
The Woven - Elegant Alchemy Table skin was introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's Terraria. Its rarity was Inspired - Elegant initially, but received change in August 19, 2022.
The Proof of Purchase All-Chemical Engine skin is obtained by purchasing the Wilson Youtooz.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Công cụ giả kim là trạm Khoa học cấp 2. Nó yêu cầu Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu cho tất cả các nhân vật ngoại trừ Wickerbottom và tốn 4 Ván ép, 2 Đá cắt và 2 Doodad Điện để chế tạo. Tạo nguyên mẫu một Vật phẩm bằng Máy luyện kim sẽ tăng Tinh thần thêm 15.
title: Alchemy Engine/DST

}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Structure Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal Arcane Crystalarium''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from November 26, 2020 to December 15, 2020. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points. * The '''Woven - Elegant Alchemy Table''' skin was introduced in the ''[[An Eye for An Eye]]'' update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's ''Terraria''. Its rarity was '''Inspired - Elegant''' initially, but received change in August 19, 2022. * The '''Proof of Purchase All-Chemical Engine''' skin is obtained by purchasing the Wilson [[Youtooz]].
{{SkinInfo |image = Alchemy Pod Icon.png |rarity = Elegant |name = Alchemy Pod |description = This pod uses space-age printing technology to perform unspace-age alchemy. How stylish! |ingame = Alchemy Pod.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Alchemy Table Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = An Eye for an Eye Collection |name = Alchemy Table |description = Everything a potion maker needs. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Gothic Alchemical Kiln Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Gothic Collection |name = Gothic Alchemical Kiln |description = A moody design for broody alchemists. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Arcane Crystalarium Icon.png |rarity = Loyal |collection = Crystalline Collection |name = Arcane Crystalarium |description = Crystals have long been thought to hold transformative powers, perfect for alchemical experiments. }} {{SkinInfo |image = All-Chemical Engine Icon.png |rarity = Proof of Purchase |rarity2 = Resurrected |name = All-Chemical Engine |description = Some might say that storing unstable chemicals next to a running engine is a "bad idea", but these people simply lack your vision. }}
== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * An easy way to gather the crafting materials for an Alchemy Engine is to hammer down [[Pig House|Pig Houses]] for Boards and Cut Stones, and to mine [[Boulder|Gold Vein Boulders]] for Gold. *The Alchemy Engine is able to unlock Tier 1 items without the need for a nearby Science Machine, so it may be beneficial to break down the Science Machine for resources after building it. * Since Wickerbottom has Tier 2 items unlocked with the Science Machine, this machine is only necessary for crafting her book [[On Tentacles]]. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * In the [[Version History|early Beta]] version of ''[[Don't Starve]]'', the game used a "[[Research points list|Research Points]]" system, instead of prototyping. Crafting this station cost 200 Research Points. * As of the ''[[New Features#July 23.2C 2013 - Hungry For Your Hunger|Hungry For Your Hunger]]'' update, Tier 3 recipes crafted using the [[Shadow Manipulator]] have been moved to the Alchemy Engine, due to the separation of Science and [[Magic]]. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == |-| Alchemy Engine= Alchemy Engine Open Gift.gif|open gift Alchemy engine animation when used.gif|used Alchemy Engine Burnt.png|burnt |-| All-Chemical Engine= All-Chemical Engine Build.png|Build All-Chemical Engine Build Burnt.png|Burnt All-Chemical Engine Build Place.gif|Place All-Chemical Engine Build Hit.gif|Hit All-Chemical Engine Build Loop.gif|Loop All-Chemical Engine Build Using.gif|Using All-Chemical Engine Build Gift Loop.gif|Gift Loop All-Chemical Engine Build Gift Give.gif|Gift Give == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Researchlab 2.gif|The Alchemy Engine's animation when the player is nearby.
